title: Poverty & Economic Justice Resources
subtitle:
Organizations and initiatives focused on combating economic inequality, debt
                    resistance, and building economic alternatives through mutual aid and collective action.

initiatives.name: Debt Collective
initiatives.description: A debtors' union fostering mutual aid and economic justice through collective organizing and direct action. They coordinate debt strikes, financial education, and solidarity networks while building power through collective bargaining, policy advocacy, and creating spaces for debtors to fight predatory financial practices and build economic alternatives.
